description: As part of join work between Atlas Axis and Core Facilitator teams, this pull request migrates the Atlas from HTML to Markdown. This allows us to express the full hierarchical structure of the Atlas and will support future automations and AI integrations that are under development.

prTitle: Atomic Atlas: decompose Sky Atlas.md into one-folder-per-document tree + sync tooling

diff: A prospective Aligned Delegate must deploy a new Delegate Contract(s) through the associated smart contract, using their chosen Ethereum address. To create a new Delegate Contract, an applicant should visit this page and connect an Ethereum wallet: [https://vote.sky.money/account](https://vote.sky.money/account).
An Aligned Delegate should deploy the new Delegate Contract(s) prior to posting a Submission Message on the Sky Forum pursuant to [A.1.
